mnemonics.title: Tree Traversals
mnemonics.content: InPrePost = LRoR, RoLR, LRRo: Inorder (Left-Root-Right), Preorder (Root-Left-Right), Postorder (Left-Right-Root).

mnemonics.title: Tree Terminology
mnemonics.content: RLEHDP: Root (top), Leaf (bottom, no children), Edge (connection), Height (root to deepest leaf), Depth (root to node), Parent (above).

mnemonics.title: Binary Tree Types
mnemonics.content: FuCoPeSk: Full (0 or 2 children), Complete (all levels full except last), Perfect (all levels full), Skewed (all left or all right).

mnemonics.title: Max Nodes in Binary Tree
mnemonics.content: Level L has max 2^L nodes. Tree of height h has max 2^(h+1) - 1 nodes.
